channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 2 Minute Medicine Rewind May 11, 2026
item.description: Adjuvanted vs High-Dose Influenza Vaccines in Older US Adults 1. Adjuvanted influenza vaccines did not differ significantly in effectiveness compared ...

item.title: Schools have cut recess for years. Why new pediatric guidance says that should change
item.description: Recess isn't just a fun break for grade schoolers. It's crucial to good health and good grades for kids of all ages.

item.title: Early Trauma May Shape Outcomes in Childhood-Onset Lupus
item.description: Adverse childhood experiences are common in children with systemic lupus erythematosus and are linked to higher odds of neuropsychiatric lupus, a coho...

item.title: What endometriosis means for pregnancy: Data show small rise in babies' congenital anomaly risk
item.description: For babies born to people with endometriosis, there is a small but significant increased risk of congenital anomalies, often called birth defects, acc...
